resources.string: Tap Speak to record one request. Recording stops when you tap Stop.
Phone control reads supported app screens and acts only after confirmation.

MILF uses Android Accessibility to read supported app screens, perform gestures, and take screenshots only when a confirmed action requires it. Do not enable this unless you want MILF to help control your phone during a session.
Approving allows one sensitive phone action for this request.
MILF reads supported app screens, performs gestures, and takes screenshots only for confirmed actions during a session.
